---
name: Feature Request

title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that would help explain the request.
